content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:1986StarToursPoster.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] opens at [[Wikipedia:Disneyland|Disneyland]] in January 1987.]]

A list of events in '''1987''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 9|09]] – [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] opens at [[Disneyland]].
*[[January 10|10]] – [[Battle for the Sunstar|The last episode]] of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Star Wars: Ewoks'']] aired.
*[[January 13|13]] – [[Droids (1986) 7|''Droids'' 7]] published.
*[[January 18|18]] – [[Ingvild Deila]] is born.
*[[January 30|30]] – [[Valene Kane]] is born.

==February==
*[[February 3|03]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 13|''Ewoks'' (1985) 13]] published.

==March==
*[[March 17|17]] – [[Droids (1986) 8|''Droids'' 8]] published.
*[[March 31|31]] – [[Ewoks (1985) 14|''Ewoks'' (1985) 14]] published.

==April==
*[[April 7|07]] – [[Ismael Cruz Cordova]] is born.
*[[April 17|17]] – [[Griffin McElroy]] is born.

==May==
*[[May 7|07]] – [[Maya Erskine]] is born.
*[[May 12|12]] – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' published.
*[[May 23|23]] – [[Starlog Salutes Star Wars|Star Wars 10th anniversary convention]] held in Los Angeles, CA.

==June==
*[[June 6|06]] – [[Daniel Logan]] is born.
*[[June 7|07]] – [[Daniel Scheinert]] is born.
*[[June 24|24]] – ''[[Star Wars]]'' parody ''[[Wikipedia:Spaceballs|Spaceballs]]'' is released.
*[[June 26|26]] – [[Zoraida Córdova]] is born.

==July==
*[[July 11|11]] – [[AJ LoCascio]] is born.
*11 – [[Cristina Valenzuela]] is born.

==August==
*[[August 5|05]] – [[Adrian Petriw]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 4|04]] – [[Richard Marquand]] dies.
*[[September 23|23]] – [[Joe Kennard]] is born.
*[[September 24|24]] – ''[[Ewoks: The Ewok Fun Colouring Book]]'' published.
*24 – ''[[Sun Star Against Shadow Stone]]'' published.
*24 – [[To Save Deej (book)|''To Save Deej'']] published.
*24 – [[Wicket's Wagon (book)|''Wicket's Wagon'']] published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[Michaela Coel]] is born.
*[[October 3|03]] – [[Mousy McCallum]] is born.
*?? – [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] is published by [[West End Games]].
*?? – [[Star Warriors: Starfighter Combat in the Star Wars Universe|''Star Warriors'']], a board game of starfighter-to-starfighter dogfighting in the ''Star Wars'' universe, is published by [[West End Games]].

==November==
*[[November 7|07]] – [[C.B. Lee]] is born.
*?? – ''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]'' is published for the first time by [[West End Games]].

==December==
*[[December 4|04]] – ''[[Star Wars (1987 video game)]]'' released.
*[[December 25|25]] – [[Joe Kaye]] dies.
*[[December 27|27]] – [[Lily Cole]] is born.
*?? – [[Star Wars 3-D 1|''Star Wars 3-D'' 1]] published.

==Unknown month==
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 1|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 1]] published in Fall.

----
{{Years-RealWorld}}

}}
